top_signals.title: The shift from black box to glass box in AI translation
top_signals.summary: AI is transforming global business faster than most organisations can govern it. Few functions illustrate that challenge more clearly than translation. Content that once took weeks now moves in hours. Costs have fallen and multilingual communication now scales at unprecedented speed. But as AI accelerates, visibility is disappearing. Across global organisations, AI increasingly generates multilingual [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Claude Fable 5 isn’t permanently leaving subscriptions, Anthropic says
top_signals.summary: Anthropic says Claude Fable 5 won't be accessible via Claude subscriptions after July 7, but it's not a permanent change, and the company expects the model to return outside the usage-based plan soon. [...]
